passive.name: Arcane Mastery
passive.description: Ryze's spells deal extra damage based on his Bonus Mana, and he gains a percentage increase to his maximum Mana based on his Ability Power.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Ryze}} gains {{sti|mana|{{as|'''maximum''' mana}}}} based on his {{sti|ap|{{as|ability power}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Ryze''' increases his {{as|{{sti|mana|'''maximum''' mana}}}} by {{as|({{#var:am}}% per 100 AP)}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The increase in maximum mana differenciates between '''base''' and '''bonus''' mana, similar to {{ri|Overgrowth}}. The product base off of '''base''' mana does ''not'' count as bonus mana.
* With {{ii|Rabadon's Deathcap}}, a total of ({{as|{{#var:rd}}% AP}}) {{as|ability power}} and ({{as|{{#expr:{{#var:am}}*(1+{{#var:rd}}/100)}}% AP}}){{as|% '''maximum''' mana}} is gained.
* ''Arcane Mastery'' together with any converter of {{as|{{sti|mana}}}} to {{as|{{sti|health}}}} ({{ii|Winter's Approach}}, {{ii|Fimbulwinter}} or the [[Ultra_Rapid_Fire#Features|U.R.F. buff]]) creates a [[Recursion|recursive stat loop]]: {{as|{{sti|ability power}}}} giving {{as|{{sti|mana}}}} and so on.

Q.name: Overload
Q.description:
Passively, Ryze's other basic abilities reset the cooldown of Overload and charge a rune. When Ryze casts Overload with 2 runes charged, he gains a brief burst of Move Speed.

On cast, Ryze throws a charge of pure energy in a line, dealing damage to the first enemy struck. If the target has Flux on it, Overload deals extra damage and bounces to nearby enemies with Flux.
Q.tooltip:
Passive: Rune Prison and Spell Flux refresh this Ability's Cooldown and charge a rune for {{ runeduration }} seconds (max {{ maximumrunes }} runes).

Active: Ryze unleashes a blast, dealing {{ qdamagecalc }} magic damage to the first enemy hit. If the target has Flux on it, it is consumed, causing this Ability to deal {{ spell.ryzer:overloaddamagebonus }}% increased damage and bounces to nearby enemies with Flux.

Ryze also discharges all runes, granting Ryze {{ movementspeedamount }}% Move Speed for {{ movementspeedduration }} seconds if {{ maximumrunes }} runes were charged.
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Ryze}} other [[Champion ability|basic ability]] casts {{sti|ah|reset}} ''Overload's'' cooldown and generate a ''{{ai|Overload 3|Ryze|Rune}}'' stack, stacking up to 2 times.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ryze''' unleashes a runic bolt in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and consumes all ''{{ai|Overload 5|Ryze|Rune}}'' stacks.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If '''Ryze''' consumes the maximum ''{{ai|Overload 4|Ryze|Rune}}'' stacks, he gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}  for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Spell Flux|Ryze|Flux}} Bonus:}} ''Overload'' deals increased damage and spreads to surrounding ''Flux'' enemies.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Ryze's''' other [[Champion ability|basic ability]] casts reset ''Overload's'' {{sti|cooldown}} and charge a [[File:Overload 3.png|20px|link=]] ''Rune'' [[stack]] for 4 seconds, refreshing on subsequent casts and stacking up to 2 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ryze''' unleashes a runic blast in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and consumes all [[File:Overload 4.png|20px|link=]] ''Rune'' stacks.
wiki_detail.description3: If '''Ryze''' consumed 2 stacks, he gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|{{ai|Spell Flux|Ryze|Flux}} Bonus:}} ''Overload'' deals {{pp|type=[[File:Realm Warp.png|20px|border]] ''Realm Warp's'' Rank|key=%|10 to 100 for 4|0 to 3}} {{ccs|increased damage|magic}} and spreads to surrounding ''Fluxed'' enemies.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Overload'' can be buffered {{fd|0.5}} seconds before it comes off cooldown.
* ''Overload'' can be buffered while casting either {{ai|Spell Flux|Ryze}} or {{ai|Rune Prison|Ryze}} to cast immediately after the previous spell's cast time.
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} to the primary target and {{tip|area damage}} to secondary targets affected by {{ai|Spell Flux|Ryze|Flux}}.
{{Effect at cast time start}}

W.name: Rune Prison
W.description: Ryze traps a target in a cage of runes, damaging them and slowing their movement. If the target has Flux on it, they are instead rooted.
W.tooltip: Ryze deals {{ wdamagecalc }} magic damage and Slows by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ ccduration }} seconds. If the target has Flux, it is consumed and this Ability Roots instead of Slowing.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ryze}} seizes the target enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Spell Flux|Ryze|Flux}} Bonus:}} The target is {{tip|root|rooted}} instead of {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ryze''' seizes the target enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 50% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|{{ai|Spell Flux|Ryze|Flux}} Bonus:}} The target is {{tip|root|rooted}} instead of {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Rune Prison'' can be buffered {{fd|0.5}} seconds before it comes off cooldown.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

E.name: Spell Flux
E.description: Ryze releases an orb of pure magical power that damages an enemy and debuffs all nearby enemies. Ryze's spells have additional effects against the debuffed enemy.
E.tooltip: Ryze fires an orb, dealing {{ edamagecalc }} magic damage and applies Flux for {{ debuffduration }} seconds to the target and nearby enemies. Enemies already afflicted with Flux will cause it to spread further.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ryze}} projects an orb upon the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The target and surrounding enemies are also marked with ''Flux'' for a short time. '''Ryze's''' basic abilities against ''Flux'' targets consume the mark to become empowered with an additional effect.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Ryze''' projects an orb upon the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}}.

The target and surrounding enemies are also marked with ''Flux'' for 4 seconds. '''Ryze's''' basic abilities against ''Flux'' targets consume the mark to become empowered with an additional effect.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Spell Flux's'' second cast on a target will apply a new ''Flux'' debuff as well as triggering the previous one (effectively refreshing the duration).
* {{pending for test}} bounce range {{tip|er|icononly = true}} to-edge or {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} to-center?
** Game data notes additional range checks of 400 (bounce range) and 500 (Q damage bounce range) against 'large' enemies.
* ''Spell Flux'' can be buffered {{fd|0.5}} seconds before it comes off cooldown.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

R.name: Realm Warp
R.description:
Passively, Overload deals even more damage against targets with Flux.

On cast, Ryze creates a portal to a nearby location. After a few seconds, allies standing near the portal are teleported to the target location.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Overload damage bonus against targets with Flux increased to {{ overloaddamagebonus }}%.

Active: Ryze opens a portal to another location. After {{ chargetimetooltip }} seconds, all allies near the portal are teleported to that location.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Ryze}} {{tip|channel|channels}} for a short time to open a portal beneath him. '''Ryze''' can act during the channel, but the portal will cancel if he is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Upon completion, allies within the portal will {{tip|blink}} to the target location.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Ryze''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for 2 seconds to open a portal beneath him, marking the target location as its destination and granting {{tip|sight}} of the area. '''Ryze''' is able to act while channeling, but the portal will cancel if he is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.description3: Upon completion, '''Ryze''' and allied units within will {{tip|blink}} to the location and become {{tip|root|rooted}}, {{tip|disarm|disarmed}}, {{tip|silence|silenced}} and {{tip|untargetable}} for {{tt|{{fd|0.75}}|Estimated}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Realm Warp will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|365|Entry portal radius for champions}} / {{tt|465|Entry portal radius for minions}} / {{tip|sight|icononly = true}} {{tt|515|Destination vision radius during channel}}
